# thoth_mcp_vendor (Resource)

Manages tenant-scoped MCP vendor registry entries used for allowlist enforcement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-friendly vendor display name.
- `host_patterns` (List of String) Allowed host patterns for this vendor (for example api.openai.com).
- `vendor_id` (String) Stable vendor identifier.

### Optional

- `approved` (Boolean) Whether this vendor is approved for pass-through MCP host access.
- `last_seen_at` (String) Last observed timestamp (RFC3339) for this vendor in runtime traffic.
- `notes` (String) Optional reviewer notes for this vendor entry.
- `source` (String) Vendor entry source (for example manual, discovered).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Resource ID (vendor_id).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
